evidence: Source and source_spec still contain the persistence logic of issue 0002, but the same files also host downstream sync_step orchestration behavior outside the issue scope.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Document or separate downstream ownership so feature-level review is not forced to reason about mixed scope.

evidence: Normalization, unique source identity, checkpoint upsert, ambiguity detection, and FK-backed cascade are all visible in code and schema.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Retain current persistence invariants and keep later orchestration logic from weakening them.

evidence: Feature-level tests exist, but source_spec is no longer feature-pure because it includes sync_step cases from later work.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Split or annotate tests by feature ownership when reprocessing historical issues.

evidence: The intended model runtime gate fails before examples load because spec/rails_helper.rb triggers ActiveRecord::ConnectionNotEstablished in the current environment.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Restore accessible PostgreSQL test runtime and rerun the model specs.

evidence: Schema and core specs look stable, but full Rails/model regression remains unconfirmed and file ownership is mixed.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Re-run the Rails/model suite and keep feature boundaries explicit.

critical_risks: Rails model runtime for issue 0002 is not currently executable in this environment.
